    Serialized Form

    • Package com.example.elcincuentazo.exceptions

        class GameOverException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • winnerName
            String winnerName
            Name of the winning player, if known at the time the exception is thrown.

      • Exception Class com.example.elcincuentazo.exceptions.InvalidCardPlayException

        class InvalidCardPlayException extends Exception implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • attemptedDelta
            int attemptedDelta
            The delta the card would have added, causing the violation.
          • currentSum
            int currentSum
            The table sum at the moment of the illegal play attempt.

            The delta the card would have added, causing the violation.
          • currentSum
